case_title: ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR CO. OF S.F. VS SERRANO, ROMER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR CO. OF S.F. AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, ROMER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, ROMER NON-APPEARANCE OF PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-08-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-12-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE SETTLEMENT CHECK, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 4/12/02 @ 10 AM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
